meta.title: HUGGO Collectivity — Local Commerce via WhatsApp
meta.description: 62% of French municipalities have no shops. HUGGO connects producers and consumers via WhatsApp. Short supply chain, anti-waste.

hero.title: Local commerce, even where there are no shops left.
hero.subtitle: HUGGO connects local producers and consumers via WhatsApp. No commercial space, no e-commerce site, no infrastructure. Just a message to order.
hero.micro-text: Local authority or producer project — let's talk

problematic.title: Rural France is losing its shops.

stats.label: of municipalities have no access to any shop
French people live more than 7 minutes by car from a food store
mobile vendor trucks serve the country

solution.title: Three ways to bring back local commerce.

cases.title: The producer selling direct.
cases.description: Your market gardener, your cheesemaker, your beekeeper: they produce nearby, but selling is still complicated. With HUGGO, their customers order via WhatsApp and pick up at the farm or collection point.

cases.title: The mobile vendor with pre-orders.
cases.description: The bread truck comes on Tuesday. Customers pre-order on WhatsApp: no waste, no shortages. The vendor prepares exactly what was ordered.

cases.title: The municipality running a "digital market."
cases.description: Multiple local producers, one WhatsApp channel. Residents order; a weekly pickup point is organized. The municipality recreates commercial activity — without opening a store.

benefits.title: Why WhatsApp is the right channel for rural areas.

items.title: No infrastructure needed.
items.description: No commercial space, no e-commerce site, no dedicated payment terminal. A smartphone and WhatsApp are enough.

items.title: A channel everyone knows.
items.description: 95% of smartphones have WhatsApp. Nothing to download, no account to create. Accessible to non-tech-savvy users, elderly people, and passing tourists.
items.proof: 60% digitization in 3 months, among historically non-tech-savvy customers.

items.title: Direct producer-to-consumer link.
items.description: The producer sells, the consumer buys. No middleman, no commission, no platform. The supply chain is as short as it gets.

items.title: Anti-waste
items.description: Pre-orders let the producer prepare only what's sold. Less waste, less surplus, less unnecessary transport.

items.title: Digital inclusion
items.description: HUGGO runs on WhatsApp — an app 95% of French people already have. No learning curve, no extra account. Ordering is as simple as texting a friend.

items.title: Strengthened local commerce
items.description: Every order through HUGGO goes directly to the merchant. No middleman platform, no commission. Revenue stays in the neighborhood, the village, the municipality.

items.title: Short supply chain
items.description: From producer to consumer, no unnecessary steps. The distance from field to plate is measured in kilometers, not warehouses.

items.title: Accessibility
items.description: Order without traveling, without queuing, without time constraints. For people with reduced mobility, elderly people, families in remote areas.

items.question: The rural population isn't connected.
items.answer: WhatsApp is installed on 95% of French smartphones. Nothing to download. HUGGO has already digitized 60% of the customer base of merchants whose clients had never ordered online — proof that the digital divide is a perceived barrier, not a real one.

items.question: We don't have a tech budget.
items.answer: No infrastructure needed: no premises, no hardware, no developer. An affordable monthly subscription, no commission on sales. The investment comes down to a smartphone and an internet connection.

items.question: Local producers already have their sales channels.
items.answer: HUGGO complements — it doesn't replace. Pre-orders reduce waste, expand the customer base beyond the weekly market, and enable sales on days the market is closed.

final-cta.title: Let's build a local commerce channel together.
final-cta.subtitle: Whether you're a producer, local authority, or mobile vendor — let's talk about what HUGGO can do for your area.
